display_text: Ancient Apparition Aghanim's Scepter: Removes cooldown and reduces manacost of Chilling Touch by 40%. This upgrade transforms Ancient Apparition into a sustained magical damage powerhouse, countering high-health regeneration and tanky lineups by enabling constant magical damage pressure in fights.
search_text: Ancient Apparition Aghanim Scepter Chilling Touch no cooldown manacost reduction anti-regen sustained damage

display_text: Ancient Apparition Aghanim's Shard: Freezes enemies hit with Ice Blast for 50% of Cold Feet's duration. This upgrade counters mobile heroes by adding a strong soft-disable effect to Ice Blast, forcing enemies to reposition or risk being frozen mid-fight.
search_text: Ancient Apparition Aghanim Shard Ice Blast Cold Feet freeze anti-mobility soft-disable
